summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SMS payment reminder platform. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% success rate), frontend loads correctly with proper branding, but authentication flow has integration issues preventing complete end-to-end testing.

integration_issues.issue: OTP verification redirects back to registration page instead of completing authentication flow
Login fails with 401 error - users created via backend API cannot login through frontend

passed_tests: Backend API - Client CRUD operations (100% success)
Backend API - Reminder CRUD operations (100% success)
Backend API - Follow-up CRUD operations (100% success)
Backend API - Campaign CRUD operations (100% success)
Backend API - SMS Provider configuration (100% success)
Backend API - AI response matching (100% success)
Frontend - Initial page load and routing
Frontend - Login page UI elements and styling
Frontend - Registration page UI elements and styling
Frontend - OTP verification page UI elements
Frontend - Protected route redirects (unauthenticated users redirect to login)
Frontend - Form validation (password confirmation, required fields)
Frontend - Responsive design and branding (white/orange theme)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication integration between frontend and backend. Issues: 1) OTP verification flow not completing properly - redirects to registration instead of login/dashboard, 2) Frontend login not working with backend-created users - investigate token handling and user verification status synchronization.
